title: Indices with over ₹20,000 crore in AUM to be called significant indices: SEBI
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   SEBI has introduced a new classification for market indices.
*   Indices meeting a specific Assets Under Management (AUM) threshold will now be termed "significant indices."
*   This designation applies to indices with over ₹20,000 crore in AUM.

title: Bihar cabinet approves 500 million U.S. dollars loan from World Bank
content:
The Bihar cabinet has officially approved a loan.
*   The loan is valued at 500 million U.S. dollars.
*   The funding will be provided by the World Bank.

title: Slain Chandranath Rath: From air force serviceman to Suvendu’s trusted troubleshooter
content:
Chandranath Rath has been slain.
*   He had a background as an air force serviceman.
*   He later became known as a trusted troubleshooter for political figure Suvendu.
